title: Willow — No Catch-Up Needed
season_arc_note: Ep 1 of 6 — arrival and introduction. Viewer meets Willow for the first time. Register is warm and unhurried. No history assumed. Tone: 'I'm glad you found this.'

provenance_card.label: Synthetic companion · AI generated performer · Willow S1 · Upon Tyne Productions

beats.role: Warm camera address — glad you're here energy
beats.speech_text: Hey. No catch-up needed — you're already here.
beats.camera: Medium-close, static, soft window light camera-left
beats.sfw_note: Fully clothed, no suggestive angle, neutral hand position
No physical contact staging, attentive posture only

beats.speech_text: Whatever you brought in today — it can just sit there for a minute. You don't have to do anything with it right now.
beats.camera: Static medium-close, hands at neutral or open gesture
beats.sfw_note: Hands visible and neutral, no proximity escalation

beats.speech_text: Take a breath if that felt right.
beats.camera: Hold — no cutaway; companion holds soft eye contact

beats.speech_text: I think showing up counts for something. I really do.
beats.camera: Warm, static, no physical proximity escalation

beats.speech_text: I'll be here again. Same time, same place. Take care.
beats.camera: Companion settles back slightly, calm exit energy
beats.sfw_note: Low-key close, no hard sell, no lingering intimate framing
